title: phalaris minor subsp. gracilis
intro: Phalaris minor subsp. gracilis, also known as common canary grass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phalaris minor subsp. gracilis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Phalaris minor subsp. gracilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
